name: Soudzoukakia (Smyrna Meatballs)
recipeIngredient: White bread slices with crusts removed (3)
Tomatoes, peeled and seeded (1 pound) or
Tomato paste diluted with water (1 tablespoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the meat is ground twice.
2. Soak bread slices in cold water and squeeze out excess moisture.
3. Mix the chopped meat, soaked bread, garlic, and cumin together. Form into egg-shaped meatballs and lightly coat with flour.
4. Heat butter or oil in a deep frying pan.
5. Fry the soudzoukakia until brown on all sides. Remove them from the pan using a slotted spoon and place them in a pot.
6. Pour the tomatoes (or diluted tomato paste) into the pan with the remaining butter or oil. Cook together for 3 to 5 minutes.
7. Serve with rice.
Note: If using egg and wine, add both to the meat mixture. Use an additional bread slice.
